items.markdown:
Stock management software `digitizes and automates inventory tracking, replacing manual spreadsheets` . It monitors real-time stock levels, manages supplier orders, and processes sales across multiple channels. This prevents stockouts and overstocking, saving businesses time and capital.[](https://www.sage.com/en-za/sage-business-cloud/accounting/features/stock-management/) [[1]](https://www.sage.com/en-za/sage-business-cloud/accounting/features/stock-management/)[[2]](https://www.capterra.co.za/directory/30006/inventory-management/software)[[3]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-za/dynamics-365/topics/field-service/inventory-management-system)

The best software depends on your industry size and specific needs:

1. Small Businesses & Beginners

- **[inFlow](https://www.forbes.com/advisor/business/software/best-inventory-management-software/):** Excellent for wholesale and B2B, featuring built-in barcode scanning and quoting tools.
- **[Zoho Inventory](https://www.zoho.com/us/inventory/):** Ideal for multichannel retailers, seamlessly connecting to Amazon, Shopify, Etsy, and major shipping carriers.[](https://www.zoho.com/us/inventory/) [[1]](https://www.zoho.com/us/inventory/)[[2]](https://www.forbes.com/advisor/business/software/best-inventory-management-software/)[[3]](https://www.capterra.co.za/directory/30006/inventory-management/software)

2. Retail & E-commerce

- **Cin7:** A robust choice for businesses with complex e-commerce integrations, warehouse management, and accounting systems.[[1]](https://www.forbes.com/advisor/business/software/best-inventory-management-software/)

3. Manufacturing & Warehousing

- **[Katana](https://katanamrp.com/blog/inventory-management-rule/):** Highly rated for tracking inventory across multiple warehouses, setting safety stock, and planning production.
- **Odoo:** A modular ERP solution that combines stock management with CRM, accounting, and point-of-sale tools.[[1]](https://www.forbes.com/advisor/business/software/best-inventory-management-software/)

4. Simple / Mobile Tracking

- **Sortly:** Perfect for field service teams or mobile-first businesses requiring quick, visual inventory tracking.[[1]](https://www.forbes.com/advisor/business/software/best-inventory-management-software/)

Most top-tier options offer cloud-based accessibility and 14-to-30-day free trials to test out your workflows.[](https://www.sage.com/en-za/sage-business-cloud/accounting/features/stock-management/) [[1]](https://www.sage.com/en-za/sage-business-cloud/accounting/features/stock-management/)[[2]](https://www.unleashedsoftware.com/)[[3]](https://www.forbes.com/advisor/business/software/best-inventory-management-software/)

This prevents stockouts and overstocking, saving businesses time and capital. www.sage.com +2

expanded_element.title: What is the 80/20 inventory management rule? - Katana MRP
expanded_element.description: The 80/20 inventory rule is the tactic of prioritizing the 20% of your inventory that accounts for 80% of your business's profit. Manufacturers usually apply this inventory rule when auditing their inventory to reduce carrying costs and lead time.
